Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jan-29-2015 Continued To Mar-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SANJAY NANGIA of Davis, Wright, Tremaine, Tel No. (415) 276-6577 appearing for Petitioner SF Urban Forest Coalition;
Deputy City Attorney ROBB W. KAPLA, Tel No. (415) 554-4647 appearing for Respondent City and County of San Francisco.

The Court required parties to appear. Matter argued by counsel. PETITIONER SF URBAN FOREST COALITION'S Motion For Writ Of Mandate is continued to Friday, March 6, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. The Court indicated to parties that it is inclined to grant Petitioner's motion on the discrete issue of the Respondent's current checklist procedure being an ineffectual means of enforcing the code. The Court continued the matter to allow parties the opportunity to come to an agreement on an alternative procedure. If parties are not able to reach an agreement, Petitioner should appear at the continued hearing date with a proposed order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Jan-22-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrea Ruiz-Esquide, Esq., Tel. 415.554.4618, and Victoria Wong, Esq., Tel. 415.554.4721, Deputy City Attorneys, for respondent and moving party CCSF;
Sanjay Nangia, Esq., Tel. 415.276.6577, and Sam N. Dawood, Esq., Tel. 415.276.6566, for Davis Wright Tremaine, for petitioner and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S (Amended) Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is denied. Petition states a claim, therefore the motion is denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
